positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical repeating pattern featuring stylized celestial elements—crescent moons, distant nebulas, and cosmic dust swirls—intertwined with organic line-art botanicals like ferns and winding vines. The style is neo-vintage botanical illustration meets psychedelic cosmic art. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blue, dusty rose pink, gold foil accents, and earthy sage green. Composition must be centered and balanced, creating a seamless, high-contrast repeating tile pattern perfect for large apparel prints. Lighting should be dramatic, simulating starlight catching on metallic dust. Clean silhouettes are essential, giving a strong graphic feel. Full color, vector quality.
